rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And Request To Dismiss Nrt West, Inc'S Second Amended Cross-Complaint For Implied Equitable Indemnity
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT WILLIAM CAMPBELL, MARJORIE CAMPBELL's Amended Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And Request To Dismiss Nrt West, Inc'S Second Amended Cross-Complaint For Implied Equitable Indemnity Hearing Required to address why set off should not be considered to "ballpark" determination and why Dilingham Const. v. Nadel partnership (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 264 and Alcal Roofing & Insulation v. Sup. Ct. (1992) 8Cal.App. 4th 1121 should not be followed: re "offset for the entire amount of that defendant's settlement." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISSETTE IRIZARRY VS. LETICIA RUIZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT LETICIA RUIZ, FRANCISCO RUIZ, JOSE RIVERA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT(TENTATIVE ISSUED BY JUDGE CHENG) transferred to department 606 to be heard by the honorable Andrew Cheng. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Notice of Termination of Tenancy is fatally defective as Plaintiff failed to provide a copy of section 37.9C to the tenants per Rent Ordinance 37.9C(c). Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that service of any (not operative) version of 37.9C(c) constitutes compliance. = (501/AYSC)

rulings.Case Title: INNOCENT EKEH VS. MARETA DEAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT MARETA DEAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled. 5 days to answer. It cannot be ascertained based on the allegations in the complaint if Plaintiff's counsel is regularly engaged in consumer debt-collection litigation. Heintz v. Jenkins (1995) 514 U.S. 291. = (501/REQ)
